name: add-docstring
prompt: Read main.py and add a one-line docstring to the main() function. Keep everything else unchanged.

name: create-utility
prompt: Create a file slug.py containing a function slugify(text) that lowercases text and replaces spaces with hyphens.

check.command: python3 -c "from slug import slugify; assert slugify('Hello World') == 'hello-world'"

name: fix-failing-test
prompt: The test in test_math.py fails. Fix the bug in mathlib.py (not the test) so it passes.

files.mathlib.py:
def add(a, b):
    return a - b
